slash.label: Slash Commands
slash.description: Discord application commands — type / in chat.

session.label: Session Commands
session.description: In-game session vote, start, and end controls.

systems.label: Automatic Systems
systems.description: Features that run without a direct command.

slash:setup.description: Manage the City of Angels server setup system (channels, roles, permissions).

subcommands.name: channels
subcommands.description: Create or update the City of Angels channel layout.

subcommands.name: roles
subcommands.description: Create or update City of Angels setup roles.

subcommands.name: permissions
subcommands.description: Reapply City of Angels channel permissions.

subcommands.name: delete-channels
subcommands.description: Delete all setup-created channels and categories.

subcommands.name: reset-server
subcommands.description: Delete setup items and rebuild the safe layout.

slash:setup-erlc-roles.description: Create or sync the in-game role hierarchy.

slash:fix-erlc-role-order.description: Reapply the role hierarchy order without touching channels.

slash:fix-erlc-channel-permissions.description: Fix existing category and channel permission overwrites.

slash:ticket-panel.description: Send the City of Angels support ticket panel to a channel.

slash:counting.description: Manage the premium counting system (channel, reset, status).

subcommands.name: setup
subcommands.description: Set the counting channel and optional start number.

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Show counting status, next number, and record.

subcommands.name: reset
subcommands.description: Reset counting to a start number.

prefix:counting.description: Manage the counting system — setup, status, reset, or disable.

subcommands.name: setup
subcommands.description: Set counting channel and optional start (`.counting setup #channel 0`).

prefix.name: counting
prefix.description: Manage the counting system — setup, status, reset, or disable.

systems.name: Welcome System
systems.description: Sends a branded welcome embed when a member joins City of Angels.

systems.name: Leveling System
systems.description: Members earn XP from messages. Use .level and .levels to view progress.

systems.name: Ticket System
systems.description: Support tickets via the /ticket-panel and button interactions.

systems.name: Counting System
systems.description: Members count up in a dedicated channel — wrong numbers or double-counts reset to 1. Use /counting or .counting to manage.

systems.name: Reaction Roles
systems.description: Self-assign roles using reaction-role panel buttons.

systems.name: Mention Responder
systems.description: Veltrix responds when @mentioned with helpful info.

systems.name: Session Logs
systems.description: Session activity logging for staff channels.
